case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JUAN ANDRES SANCHEZ UC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UC, JUAN ANDRES SANCHEZ $1,398.81 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,473.81 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ***FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00*** SERVED MAR-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UC, JUAN ANDRES SANCHEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. JESSE ANTOHNY OCHOA APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,398.81 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT UC, JUAN ANDRES SANCHEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
